calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Neal for Jeannie Bradshaw (Petitioner/Executor).

The Court stated that there is an issue with the Personal Representative's request for costs which are normally expected to be part of ordinary compensation and the request for allowing Attorney's costs before they have actually been incurred when also seeking a reserve. Mr. Neal stated that he filed a declaration indicating that the Decedent's family, the Executor and her Husband live in Texas, that because of the personal belongings to be distributed and the sale of the real property the Executor felt one single trip to complete the sale and transport the personal property was essential and necessary to limit the expense to the estate, that the Executor made the trip in 9-days and asked the Court to approve it. Mr. Neal also stated that he has no problem with waiving the fees for certification of the final order. The Second Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Siu. Not reported.
